251.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ giving a sermon saying: "O people, what makes you follow one another in lying, just as moths follow one another into the fire? Every lie is recorded against the son of Adam, except..."
251.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ berkhutbah mengatakan: "Wahai manusia, apa yang membuat kalian saling mengikuti dalam berdusta, sebagaimana ngengat saling mengikuti masuk ke dalam api? Setiap dusta dicatat atas anak Adam, kecuali..."

252.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Dajjal will remain on earth for forty years — the year like a month, the month like a week, the week like a day, and the day like the burning of a palm frond in fire.'"
252.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dajjal akan tinggal di bumi selama empat puluh tahun — tahunnya seperti sebulan, bulannya seperti seminggu, minggunya seperti sehari, dan harinya seperti kobaran pelepah kurma dalam api.'"

253.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Prophet of Allah, one of us may be presenting herself to her husband and he does not find her pretty enough unless she adorns or beautifies herself." The Prophet of Allah ﷺ said: "Any woman who wears a gold necklace will have the like of it placed around her neck as fire on the Day of Resurrection, and any woman who wears a gold earring will have its like placed in her ear as fire on the Day of Resurrection."
253.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Nabi Allah, salah seorang dari kami mungkin mempersembahkan dirinya kepada suaminya dan ia tidak merasa cantik cukup kecuali ia berhias atau memperindah dirinya." Nabi Allah ﷺ bersabda: "Wanita mana pun yang mengenakan kalung emas akan dikenakan padanya hal serupa dari api di lehernya pada Hari Kiamat, dan wanita mana pun yang mengenakan anting emas akan dikenakan padanya hal serupa di telinganya sebagai api pada Hari Kiamat."

254.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion that he said: "Amr drank from knowledge in the most beneficial way." He said: "Mu'ammar died when he was fifty-eight years old."
254.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat bahwa ia berkata: "Amr meminum dari ilmu dengan cara yang paling bermanfaat." Ia berkata: "Mu'ammar meninggal ketika berusia lima puluh delapan tahun."

255.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Goodness is permanently tied to the forelocks of horses until the Day of Resurrection. Whoever ties a horse as preparation in the way of Allah and spends on it seeking reward in the way of Allah — its fullness, its hunger, its quenching, its thirst, its dung, and its urine will be success in his scale on the Day of Resurrection. Whoever ties it out of show and pride and joy — its fullness, hunger, quenching, and thirst will be a loss in his scale."
255.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Kebaikan terikat secara permanen pada ubun-ubun kuda hingga Hari Kiamat. Barangsiapa menambatkan kuda sebagai persiapan di jalan Allah dan menginfakkan untuknya mencari pahala di jalan Allah — kekenyangan, kelaparannya, rasa puasnya, rasa hausnya, kotorannya, dan kencingnya akan menjadi keberhasilan dalam timbangannya pada Hari Kiamat. Barangsiapa menambatkannya karena pamer dan kesombongan dan kesenangan — kekenyangan, kelaparan, rasa puas, dan rasa hausnya akan menjadi kerugian dalam timbangannya."

256.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I was holding the reins of al-Adhba, the she-camel of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when the entire Surah al-Ma'ida was revealed to him, and it nearly broke the foreleg of the camel due to its weight."
256.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku sedang memegang tali kekang al-Adhba, unta betina Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika seluruh Surah al-Maidah diturunkan kepadanya, dan hampir saja mematahkan kaki depan unta karena beratnya."

257.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by some people, among them a man who was fasting. When a drink reached him, he said: "Drink." They said: "O Messenger of Allah, he does not break his fast — he fasts continuously." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "He has not fasted who fasts forever."
257.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewati beberapa orang, di antara mereka ada seorang laki-laki yang berpuasa. Ketika minuman sampai kepadanya, beliau bersabda: "Minumlah." Mereka berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, ia tidak berbuka puasa — ia berpuasa terus-menerus." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Orang yang berpuasa selamanya tidak dianggap berpuasa."

258.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Any woman who wears a gold necklace will have the like of it placed around her neck as fire on the Day of Resurrection. And any woman who places a gold ring in her ear will have its like placed in her ear as fire on the Day of Resurrection."
258.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Wanita mana pun yang mengenakan kalung emas akan dikenakan padanya hal serupa di lehernya sebagai api pada Hari Kiamat. Dan wanita mana pun yang meletakkan cincin emas di telinganya akan dikenakan padanya hal serupa di telinganya sebagai api pada Hari Kiamat."

259.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ passed by a woman wearing two gold bracelets and said to her: "Would it please you if Allah were to adorn you with two bracelets of fire?" She removed them. Asma said: "By Allah, I do not know whether she removed them or I removed them."
259.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melewati seorang wanita yang mengenakan dua gelang emas dan berkata kepadanya: "Apakah kamu senang jika Allah menghiasimu dengan dua gelang dari api?" Ia melepasnya. Asma berkata: "Demi Allah, aku tidak tahu apakah ia yang melepasnya atau akulah yang melepasnya."

260.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ returned and the people were anxious and grieved from what he had told them. He took hold of the two door handles and said: "O Asma?" She said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, you have terrified our hearts by your mention of the Dajjal.'" He said: "Even if he emerges while I am alive, I will confront him. If not, then my Lord is my guardian over every believer." Asma said: "O Messenger of Allah, by Allah we knead our dough and cannot bake it until we are hungry — so how will the believers be at that time?" He said: "That will suffice them..."
260.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ kembali dan orang-orang dalam keadaan cemas dan sedih dari apa yang beliau ceritakan kepada mereka. Beliau memegang dua pegangan pintu dan berkata: "Wahai Asma?" Ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, engkau telah menakut-nakuti hati kami dengan penyebutan Dajjal.'" Beliau bersabda: "Bahkan jika ia muncul saat aku masih hidup, aku akan menghadapinya. Jika tidak, maka Tuhanku adalah wali setiap mukmin." Asma berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, demi Allah kami menguleni adonan kami dan tidak dapat memanggang hingga kami lapar — lantas bagaimana keadaan kaum mukmin saat itu?" Beliau bersabda: "Itu akan mencukupi mereka..."

261.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid ibn Sakan (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When Sa'd ibn Mu'adh died, his mother cried out. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'May your tears be dried and your grief removed, for your son is the first for whom Allah smiled and for whom the Throne shook.'"
261.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid bin Sakan (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Sa'd bin Mu'adz meninggal, ibunya menjerit. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Semoga air matamu mengering dan kesedihanmu hilang, karena anakmu adalah orang pertama yang membuat Allah tersenyum untuknya dan Arsy berguncang karenanya.'"

262.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: "The aqiqah for a boy is two sheep of similar size, and for a girl, one sheep."
262.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: "Aqiqah untuk anak laki-laki adalah dua ekor domba yang sebanding, dan untuk anak perempuan, satu ekor domba."

263.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Perhaps one of you tells others what he does with his wife, and perhaps a woman tells others what she did with her husband?" The people were silent. She said: "Yes, by Allah, O Messenger of Allah — the women do tell and the men do as well." He said: "Do not do that. It is like a male devil who meets a female devil on the road and has intercourse with her while people are watching."
263.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Mungkin salah seorang dari kalian menceritakan kepada orang lain apa yang ia lakukan dengan istrinya, dan mungkin seorang wanita menceritakan kepada orang lain apa yang ia lakukan dengan suaminya?" Orang-orang diam. Ia berkata: "Ya, demi Allah, ya Rasulullah — para wanita memang menceritakan dan para pria juga." Beliau bersabda: "Jangan lakukan itu. Itu seperti setan jantan yang bertemu setan betina di jalan dan berhubungan dengannya sementara orang-orang menyaksikan."

264.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Any woman who wears a gold necklace will have the like of it placed around her neck as fire on the Day of Resurrection. And any woman who places a gold ring in her ear will have its like placed in her ear on the Day of Resurrection."
264.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Wanita mana pun yang mengenakan kalung emas akan dikenakan padanya hal serupa di lehernya sebagai api pada Hari Kiamat. Dan wanita mana pun yang meletakkan cincin emas di telinganya akan dikenakan padanya hal serupa di telinganya pada Hari Kiamat."

265.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Do not kill your children secretly, for by Him in Whose Hand is my soul, it can overtake a horseman and unseat him." She said: "I asked: 'What does he mean?' He said: 'Al-Ghayl — a man who goes to his wife while she is nursing.'"
265.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Jangan membunuh anak-anak kalian secara diam-diam, karena demi Dia yang jiwaku ada di tangan-Nya, hal itu dapat menimpa seorang penunggang kuda dan menjatuhkannya." Ia berkata: "Aku bertanya: 'Apa yang beliau maksud?' Ia berkata: 'Al-Ghayl — seorang laki-laki yang mendatangi istrinya sementara ia menyusui.'"

266.iwh_en: It was narrated from a narrator that he said: "I heard Hammad ibn Zayd mention the Jahmiyya and say: 'They are only trying to claim that there is nothing in the sky.'"
266.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang perawi bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Hammad bin Zaid menyebutkan kaum Jahmiyyah dan berkata: 'Mereka hanya berusaha mengklaim bahwa tidak ada apa-apa di langit.'"

267.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ died on the day he died with his armor pledged to a Jewish man for a wasq of barley.
267.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ wafat pada hari beliau wafat dengan baju besinya digadaikan kepada seorang laki-laki Yahudi dengan imbalan satu wasq gandum.

268.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Join Syria, for Syria is the land of emigration, the land of the gathering, and the land of the prophets." He said to the man: "How will you be if they expel you from Syria?" He said: "I will return to it and make it my home." He said: "How will you be if they expel you a second time?" He said: "I will take my sword and fight until I die." He smiled at him and said: "Shall I direct you to something better than that?"
268.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Bergabunglah dengan Syam, karena Syam adalah tanah hijrah, tanah pengumpulan, dan tanah para nabi." Beliau berkata kepada laki-laki itu: "Bagaimana keadaanmu jika mereka mengusirmu dari Syam?" Ia berkata: "Aku akan kembali ke sana dan menjadikannya rumahku." Beliau bersabda: "Bagaimana keadaanmu jika mereka mengusirmu untuk kedua kalinya?" Ia berkata: "Aku akan mengambil pedangku dan berjuang sampai aku mati." Beliau tersenyum kepadanya dan bersabda: "Tidakkah aku tunjukkan kepadamu sesuatu yang lebih baik dari itu?"

269.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ passed by women and said: "Beware of ingratitude toward those who bestow blessings. Beware of ingratitude toward those who bestow blessings." One of them said: "O Messenger of Allah, I seek refuge in Allah from ingratitude toward Allah!" He said: "Indeed, one of you may remain unmarried for a long time, then Allah gives her a husband and grants her children and joy of her heart, but then she becomes angry and swears by Allah that she has never seen a good moment from him — and that is ingratitude toward the blessings of Allah."
269.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melewati wanita-wanita dan bersabda: "Berhati-hatilah dari mengingkari nikmat orang-orang yang memberi nikmat. Berhati-hatilah dari mengingkari nikmat orang-orang yang memberi nikmat." Salah seorang dari mereka berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, aku berlindung kepada Allah dari mengingkari nikmat Allah!" Beliau bersabda: "Sesungguhnya salah seorang dari kalian mungkin tetap tidak menikah untuk waktu yang lama, kemudian Allah memberinya suami dan menganugerahinya anak-anak dan kebahagiaan hatinya, namun kemudian ia marah dan bersumpah dengan Allah bahwa ia tidak pernah melihat satu saat pun yang baik darinya — dan itulah mengingkari nikmat Allah."

270.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid al-Ansariyya (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Do not kill your children secretly, for al-ghayl overtakes a horseman and unseats him from above his horse."
270.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid al-Anshariyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Jangan membunuh anak-anak kalian secara diam-diam, karena al-ghayl menimpa seorang penunggang kuda dan menjatuhkannya dari atas kudanya."

271.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "She took it and drank a little. The Prophet ﷺ then said to her: 'Give it to your companion.' I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, rather take it and drink from it, then pass it to me from your hand.' He took it and drank from it, then passed it to her. She sat and placed it on her knee, then began turning it and following it with her lips to reach the place where the Prophet ﷺ had drunk. He then said to the women with him: 'Pass it to them.' They said: 'We do not want it.' He said: 'Do not combine hunger with a lie.'"
271.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ia mengambilnya dan minum sedikit. Nabi ﷺ kemudian berkata kepadanya: 'Berikan kepada temanmu.' Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, ambillah dan minumlah darinya, kemudian serahkan padaku dari tanganmu.' Beliau mengambilnya dan minum darinya, kemudian menyerahkannya kepadanya. Ia duduk dan meletakkannya di lututnya, kemudian mulai memutarnya dan mengikutinya dengan bibirnya untuk mencapai tempat Nabi ﷺ telah minum. Beliau kemudian berkata kepada wanita-wanita yang bersamanya: 'Serahkan kepada mereka.' Mereka berkata: 'Kami tidak menginginkannya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Jangan menggabungkan lapar dengan dusta.'"

272.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The entire Surah al-Ma'ida was revealed to the Prophet ﷺ at once — it nearly broke the camel due to its weight."
272.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seluruh Surah al-Maidah diturunkan kepada Nabi ﷺ sekaligus — hampir saja ia mematahkan unta karena beratnya."

273.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever ties a horse in the way of Allah and spends on it seeking reward, its fullness and its hunger, its quenching and its thirst, its urine and its dung will be in his scale on the Day of Resurrection. And whoever ties a horse out of show and pride, that will be a loss in his scale on the Day of Resurrection.'"
273.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa menambatkan kuda di jalan Allah dan menginfakkan untuknya mencari pahala, kekenyangan dan kelaparannya, rasa puasnya dan rasa hausnya, kencingnya dan kotorannya akan ada dalam timbangannya pada Hari Kiamat. Dan barangsiapa menambatkan kuda karena pamer dan kesombongan, hal itu akan menjadi kerugian dalam timbangannya pada Hari Kiamat.'"

274.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I do not shake hands with women.'"
274.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku tidak berjabat tangan dengan wanita.'"

275.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recite: 'He is indeed of a conduct not righteous.'"
275.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ membaca: 'Sesungguhnya ia adalah perbuatan yang tidak saleh.'"

276.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I heard the Prophet ﷺ recite: 'O My servants who have exceeded against their own souls — do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed Allah forgives all sins — and He does not mind — for He is the Ever-Forgiving, the Ever-Merciful.'"
276.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Nabi ﷺ membaca: 'Wahai hamba-hamba-Ku yang telah melampaui batas terhadap diri mereka sendiri — janganlah kamu berputus asa dari rahmat Allah. Sesungguhnya Allah mengampuni semua dosa — dan Dia tidak peduli — karena Dia Maha Pengampun, Maha Penyayang.'"

277.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: "Lying is not permitted except in three cases: a man lying to his wife to make her pleased with him, lying in war — for war is deception, and lying in order to reconcile between people."
277.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: "Berdusta tidak diperbolehkan kecuali dalam tiga hal: seorang laki-laki yang berdusta kepada istrinya untuk membuatnya ridha kepadanya, berdusta dalam perang — karena perang adalah tipu daya, dan berdusta untuk mendamaikan antara orang-orang."

278.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ presented milk to those who had accompanied Aisha when she was brought to him. They said: "We do not want it." The Prophet ﷺ said: "Do not combine hunger with a lie."
278.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menyajikan susu kepada mereka yang menemani Aisyah ketika ia dibawa kepadanya. Mereka berkata: "Kami tidak menginginkannya." Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Jangan menggabungkan lapar dengan dusta."

279.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Shall I not tell you about the best among you?" They said: "Yes, O Messenger of Allah." He said: "Those who, when they are seen, cause Allah the Almighty to be remembered." Then he said: "Shall I not tell you about the worst among you? They are those who carry tales, those who corrupt relationships between loved ones, and those who seek harm for the innocent."
279.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidakkah aku beritahukan kepada kalian tentang yang terbaik di antara kalian?" Mereka berkata: "Ya, ya Rasulullah." Beliau bersabda: "Mereka yang ketika dilihat, membuat Allah Ta'ala diingat." Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Tidakkah aku beritahukan kepada kalian tentang yang terburuk di antara kalian? Mereka adalah orang-orang yang mengadu domba, yang merusak hubungan antara orang-orang yang dicintai, dan yang mencari-cari keburukan bagi orang-orang yang tidak bersalah."

280.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Dajjal will remain on earth for forty years — the year like a month, the month like a week, the week like a day, and the day like the burning of a palm frond in fire.'"
280.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dajjal akan tinggal di bumi selama empat puluh tahun — tahunnya seperti sebulan, bulannya seperti seminggu, minggunya seperti sehari, dan harinya seperti kobaran pelepah kurma dalam api.'"

281.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Shall I not tell you of the best among you?" They said: "Yes." He said: "The best of you are those who, when seen, cause Allah the Almighty to be remembered. Shall I not tell you of the worst among you?" They said: "Yes." He said: "The worst of you are those who corrupt relationships between loved ones, carry tales, and seek harm for those who are innocent."
281.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidakkah aku beritahukan kepada kalian tentang yang terbaik di antara kalian?" Mereka berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Yang terbaik di antara kalian adalah mereka yang ketika dilihat, membuat Allah Ta'ala diingat. Tidakkah aku beritahukan kepada kalian tentang yang terburuk di antara kalian?" Mereka berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Yang terburuk di antara kalian adalah mereka yang merusak hubungan antara orang-orang yang dicintai, mengadu domba, dan mencari-cari keburukan bagi mereka yang tidak bersalah."

282.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to her aunt: "Do you not realize that he means your two bracelets?" Her aunt took them off and threw them away. She then said: "O Prophet of Allah, when they do not adorn themselves, they are considered unattractive to their husbands." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ smiled and said: "Cannot one of you make a collar of silver and a bead of silver and dye it with saffron so that it looks like gold? For whoever adorns herself with a gold piece the weight of a locust's eye or its glitter..."
282.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada bibinya: "Apakah kamu tidak menyadari bahwa ia maksudnya dua gelangmu itu?" Bibinya melepasnya dan melemparkannya. Ia kemudian berkata: "Wahai Nabi Allah, ketika mereka tidak berhias, mereka dianggap tidak menarik oleh suami-suami mereka." Rasulullah ﷺ tersenyum dan bersabda: "Tidakkah salah seorang dari kalian membuat kalung dari perak dan manik-manik dari perak dan mencelupnya dengan kunyit sehingga terlihat seperti emas? Karena barangsiapa yang berhias dengan sepotong emas seberat mata belalang atau kilaunya..."

283.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "If he dies, he dies as a disbeliever. If he repents, Allah accepts his repentance. If he returns, it is incumbent upon Allah to give him to drink from the tina al-khabal." She said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, what is tina al-khabal?'" He said: "The pus of the people of the Fire."
283.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Jika ia mati, ia mati sebagai orang kafir. Jika ia bertobat, Allah menerima tobatnya. Jika ia kembali (berbuat dosa), maka sudah seharusnya bagi Allah untuk memberinya minum dari thinah al-khabal." Ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, apa itu thinah al-khabal?'" Beliau bersabda: "Nanah penghuni neraka."

284.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to her aunt: "Do you not hear what he is saying?" She said: "What is he saying?" She said: "He is saying: 'Would it please you to have two bracelets of fire placed on your hands?' — or she said: 'two shackles of fire.'" So her aunt pulled them off and threw them, and no one knew who took them.
284.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada bibinya: "Apakah kamu tidak mendengar apa yang ia katakan?" Ia berkata: "Apa yang ia katakan?" Ia berkata: "Ia mengatakan: 'Apakah kamu senang jika dua gelang dari api diletakkan di tanganmu?' — atau ia berkata: 'dua belenggu dari api.'" Maka bibinya menarik dan melemparkannya, dan tidak ada yang tahu siapa yang mengambilnya.

285.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Any woman who wears a gold necklace will have the like of it placed around her neck as fire on the Day of Resurrection. And any woman who places a gold ring in her ear will have its like placed in her ear as fire on the Day of Resurrection."
285.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Wanita mana pun yang mengenakan kalung emas akan dikenakan padanya hal serupa di lehernya sebagai api pada Hari Kiamat. Dan wanita mana pun yang meletakkan cincin emas di telinganya akan dikenakan padanya hal serupa di telinganya sebagai api pada Hari Kiamat."

286.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Prophet ﷺ recite: "He is indeed of a conduct not righteous." And she heard him recite: "O My servants who have exceeded against their own souls — do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed Allah forgives all sins — and He does not mind."
286.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ membaca: "Sesungguhnya ia adalah perbuatan yang tidak saleh." Dan ia mendengar beliau membaca: "Wahai hamba-hamba-Ku yang telah melampaui batas terhadap diri mereka sendiri — janganlah kamu berputus asa dari rahmat Allah. Sesungguhnya Allah mengampuni semua dosa — dan Dia tidak peduli."

287.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he recited: "For the accustomed security of the Quraysh — their accustomed security in the journeys of winter and summer" — then he said: "O Quraysh, worship the Lord of this House who fed you from hunger and made you safe from fear."
287.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau membaca: "Karena kebiasaan keamanan kaum Quraisy — kebiasaan mereka dalam perjalanan musim dingin dan musim panas" — kemudian beliau bersabda: "Wahai Quraisy, sembahlah Rabb rumah ini yang memberi kalian makan dari kelaparan dan membuat kalian aman dari ketakutan."

288.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Lying is not permitted except in three cases: a man lying to his wife to make her pleased with him, reconciling between people, and lying in war.'"
288.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berdusta tidak diperbolehkan kecuali dalam tiga hal: seorang laki-laki yang berdusta kepada istrinya untuk membuatnya ridha kepadanya, mendamaikan antara orang-orang, dan berdusta dalam perang.'"

289.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: "Whoever defends his brother's honor against backbiting, it is incumbent upon Allah to free him from the Fire."
289.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: "Barangsiapa membela kehormatan saudaranya dari ghibah, maka sudah seharusnya bagi Allah untuk membebaskannya dari api neraka."

290.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever defends his brother's honor in backbiting, it is incumbent upon Allah to free him from the Fire.'"
290.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa membela kehormatan saudaranya dalam ghibah, maka sudah seharusnya bagi Allah untuk membebaskannya dari api neraka.'"

291.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say regarding these two verses: 'Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence' and 'Alif-Lam-Mim. Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence': 'They contain the Greatest Name of Allah.'"
291.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda mengenai dua ayat ini: 'Allah — tidak ada tuhan selain Dia, Yang Maha Hidup, Yang terus menerus mengurus makhluk-Nya' dan 'Alif-Lam-Mim. Allah — tidak ada tuhan selain Dia, Yang Maha Hidup, Yang terus menerus mengurus makhluk-Nya': 'Keduanya mengandung Nama Allah yang Agung.'"

292.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever builds a mosque for Allah, Allah will build for him a house in Paradise wider than it."
292.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa membangun masjid untuk Allah, Allah akan membangunkan untuknya sebuah rumah di surga yang lebih luas darinya."

293.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Prophet ﷺ recite: "Indeed Allah forgives all sins — and He does not mind — for He is the Ever-Forgiving, the Ever-Merciful."
293.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ membaca: "Sesungguhnya Allah mengampuni semua dosa — dan Dia tidak peduli — karena Dia Maha Pengampun, Maha Penyayang."

294.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) that she and another woman came to the Prophet ﷺ while wearing gold bracelets. He said to them: "Do you pay zakat on these?" They said: "No." He said: "Do you not fear that Allah will adorn you with bracelets of fire? Pay the zakat on them."
294.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia dan seorang wanita lain datang kepada Nabi ﷺ sementara keduanya mengenakan gelang emas. Beliau berkata kepada mereka: "Apakah kalian membayar zakat untuk ini?" Mereka berkata: "Tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Apakah kalian tidak takut bahwa Allah akan menghiasi kalian dengan gelang dari api? Bayarlah zakatnya."

295.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of the Companions (may Allah be pleased with her) that a new garment was given to her and she put it on. She then said: "O my mother, prepare my bedding in the middle of the house." She did so, and she lay down facing the qibla, placing her hand under her cheek. She then said: "O my mother, I am being taken now — I am being taken now. I have purified myself, so let no one uncover me." She was taken at that very spot. Ali came and she informed him.
295.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa sebuah pakaian baru diberikan kepadanya dan ia memakainya. Ia kemudian berkata: "Wahai ibuku, siapkan tempat tidurku di tengah rumah." Ibunya melakukannya, dan ia berbaring menghadap kiblat, meletakkan tangannya di bawah pipinya. Ia kemudian berkata: "Wahai ibuku, aku akan diambil sekarang — aku akan diambil sekarang. Aku telah bersuci, maka jangan ada yang menyingkapku." Ia diambil tepat di tempat itu. Ali datang dan ibunya memberitahunya.

296.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I never heard anyone complain to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ of a pain in the head except that he said: 'Apply cupping.' And I never heard anyone complain to him of a pain in the legs except that he said: 'Apply henna to them.'"
296.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku tidak pernah mendengar seseorang pun mengadukan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ sakit kepala kecuali beliau bersabda: 'Lakukan bekam.' Dan aku tidak pernah mendengar seseorang mengadukan kepadanya sakit kaki kecuali beliau bersabda: 'Oleskan henna pada keduanya.'"

297.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Whenever anyone complained to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ of a pain in the head, he would say: 'Apply cupping.' And whenever anyone complained to him of a pain in the legs, he would say: 'Apply henna to your legs.'"
297.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Setiap kali seseorang mengadukan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ sakit kepala, beliau akan bersabda: 'Lakukan bekam.' Dan setiap kali seseorang mengadukan kepadanya sakit kaki, beliau akan bersabda: 'Oleskan henna pada kakimu.'"

298.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sharik (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ ordered her to kill geckos.
298.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Syarik (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk membunuh cicak.

299.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sharik (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'People will flee from the Dajjal into the mountains.'" Umm Sharik said: "O Messenger of Allah, where will the Arabs be at that time?" He said: "They will be few."
299.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Syarik (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang-orang akan lari dari Dajjal ke pegunungan.'" Umm Syarik berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, di manakah orang-orang Arab pada saat itu?" Beliau bersabda: "Mereka akan sedikit."

300.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sharik (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was among those women who offered themselves in marriage to the Prophet ﷺ.
300.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Syarik (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia termasuk di antara wanita-wanita yang menyerahkan dirinya dalam pernikahan kepada Nabi ﷺ.
